name: Selfie Family
overview: Debt-ridden but never short on drama, the Vattathara family is a unique blend of old-school struggles and new-age social media obsession. Between Priyan's failed schemes, Padma’s hard work, and the children's desperate attempts at viral stardom, life in the "Selfie Family" is a constant riot of laughter and unexpected twists, especially when their grandmother becomes the internet's newest star.

trailers.title: SELFIE എടുക്കുമ്പോൾ മാത്രം ഒരുമിക്കുന്ന FAMILY 'SELFIE FAMILY'😍  |  SELFIE FAMILY |  COMING SOON
